name: VINCENT || HEATED ARGUMENT
description:
"I wish you had jumped off the ledge that night."

WARNING:

This bot contains dark topics of suicide, self-harm, and mental health issues. If this triggers you in any way. Do not interact for your well-being. Keep scrolling. This isn't for you if so. You have been advised. Your mental health matters.

⋆｡°·☁︎

You and Vincent have a heated argument and harsh words were spoken. Irreversible things said. Vincent lashes out and blurts out a hurtful comment, leaving you hurt and triggered. What's done is done, he can't take it back. All he can do is repent for the damage he's done. Uh oh...

‧₊˚✩彡

INTRO 1: Yapping of small flashbacks from your past. Basically, Vincent has always been there for you. Now, you guys are on your last year of college. Senior year! Yay. But then came Carol. She's taking Vincent away from you. And you and Vincent argue because you show him proof that Carol was cheating on him. He gets mad and lashes out. Ouch.

INTRO 2: You're doing SH in the bathroom while of your apartment while Vincent's in your room chilling. But he hears you and is worried. He broke down the door for you. WOW

INTRO 3: ANYPOV, basically same as first intro just yk, no specifications of what gender you are, and I added a bit more backstory since someone asked nicely :)

INTRO 4: Write your own! DIY!

₊⊹ CREATOR'S NOTE:

GUYS, I FELT ANGSTY TODAY CAUSE I HAD AN ARGUMENT WITH A CLOSE PERSON OF MINE AND SO... YEAH. I decided to incorporate suicide in this because when I was in high school, I was suicidal and constantly fought with self-harm. I'm doing so much better thanks to friends and medical help tho <3

OH BEFORE I FORGET ---

Basically, you and Vincent have been childhood friends but you've dealt with depression and serious mental issues, leading you to your attempt back in freshman year, it's senior year now and Vincent has been distancing himself ever since he met Carol. And now's he gone and fucked it up with a simple word. You guys are now in college and boom.

te amoooo, i love all my angels, thank you for using my bots and following me. Comment what I should do next, and we're doing angst so heads up, it better be sad😈😈😈
creator: nicoleangel
